name: Use Magic Device
description: Attunement: you can attune to up to four magic items at once. Charges: when you use a magic item property that expends charges, roll 1d6 and on a 6 you don't expend them. Scrolls: you can use any Spell Scroll, casting with Intelligence; cantrip or level 1 spells cast reliably, while higher-level ones require a DC 10 plus the spell's level Intelligence (Arcana) check.
